patch.value: Sandbox audit fixes: package describe accepts npm package name; pm context <id> routes to pm get

2026-07-04 full-ecosystem sandbox audit findings, both fixed: (1) pm extension list surfaces package_name (@unbrained/pm-kanban) but pm package describe only matched the extension name (builtin-kanban-profile) — describe now also matches source_package and the NOT_FOUND error lists loaded names; (2) pm context <id> failed with a generic too-many-arguments error — new context_takes_no_item_argument guidance routes agents to pm get <id> / pm context --parent <id> with suggested_retry.

2026-07-04 full-ecosystem sandbox audit findings, all fixed: (1) pm package describe only matched the extension name (builtin-kanban-profile), not the npm package name (@unbrained/pm-kanban) surfaced by pm extension list — describe now also matches source_package, builtin installs persist source.package provenance in .managed-extensions.json (resolveBundledPackageNpmName), command_discovery.package_name now reports the real npm name, and the NOT_FOUND error lists loaded names; (2) pm context <id> failed with a generic too-many-arguments error — new context_takes_no_item_argument guidance routes agents to pm get <id> / pm context --parent <id> with suggested_retry.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Builtin installs previously wrote no source.package into .managed-extensions.json, so LoadedExtension.source_package stayed undefined for every bundled package — any feature keying on npm package names must persist provenance at install time, not derive it at read time from the bundled catalog.

patch.value: pm package describe <npm-name> resolves for builtin installs; pm context <id> returns routed guidance with suggested_retry pm get <id>; NOT_FOUND describe errors list loaded names; specs cover source_package matching and guidance branches.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: 2026-07-04 verified live in fresh sandbox (dist build): pm package describe @unbrained/pm-kanban resolves via source_package; NOT_FOUND lists 11 loaded names; pm context <id> returns context_takes_no_item_argument with suggested_retry pm get <id>.
